title: Crunchy British Pork Pie
description: Savory pork pie with a crisp puff pastry shell and a tangy sugar‑free passion fruit glaze, delivering comforting British comfort food.

ingredients.name: Spice mix (cumin, smoked paprika, thyme, coriander)
ingredients.amount: 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1 tsp dried thyme, ½ tsp ground coriander

ingredients.name: Glaze (passion fruit pulp, sweetener, flour, vinegar, soy sauce)
ingredients.amount: ½ cup passion fruit pulp (45 g) + 2 tbsp sugar‑free sweetener + 1 tbsp all‑purpose flour + 1 tsp apple cider vinegar + 1 tsp low‑sodium soy sauce

instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add the ground pork and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon. Stir in the spice mix, salt, and pepper; cook for another 3 minutes.
Transfer the pork mixture to a bowl and let it cool slightly.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to about 5 mm thickness. Cut into four equal squares.
Place a generous spoonful of the pork filling onto the center of each pastry square, then fold to form a small pie shape and seal the edges with a fork.
Arrange the pies on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush the tops with the glaze mixture.
Bake for 20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden and crisp.
Remove from the oven, allow to cool 5 minutes, then serve warm.
